rule_metadata.name: Unk_Mythic_Loader
rule_metadata.author: @bartblaze
rule_metadata.description: Identifies an unknown loader for Mythic C2, likely redteam or APT.

rules.rule_text:
rule Unk_Mythic_Loader
{
	meta:
		id = "14BIyhtqgQCTCfLjhUU27p"
		fingerprint = "v1_sha256_30aabd24914ecbce0404d81427b6c6f2f6c5d92c342070da2cab90ed01bc754b"
		version = "1.0"
		date = "2026-01-27"
		modified = "2026-01-27"
		status = "RELEASED"
		sharing = "TLP:CLEAR"
		source = "BARTBLAZE"
		author = "@bartblaze"
		description = "Identifies an unknown loader for Mythic C2, likely redteam or APT."
		category = "MALWARE"
		malware_type = "LOADER"
		hash = "e7e4eee2bed7f472c0cd753f13bee3d2d3eefa7e055374d7fcd89049e836119e"

	strings:
		$ = "[-] Error in NTWVM_4"
		$ = "[-] Error in NTWVM_3"
		$ = "[-] Error in NTWVM_2"
		$ = "[-] Error in NTWVM_1"
		$ = "[-] Error in NTAVM: "
		$ = "[-] Unable to get NNSsrc\\syscall.rs"
		$ = "[-] NT headers do not match signature with from dll base"
		$ = "[-] DOS header not matched from base address"
		$ = "[-] Error in NTWVM_4"
		$ = "[-] Unable to get NNS"
		$ = "[+] Found the PEB and the InMemoryOrderModuleList at"
		$ = "[+] Module address:"
		$ = "[+] DOS header matched"
		$ = "[+] NT headers matched"
		$ = "[+] Function name found"

	condition:
		8 of them
}
